stories.title: Create a board and add tasks
stories.intro: Tasks keeps a shared to-do board for humans and agents. Sign in with your passkey, make a team, and drop work into its lanes — the same board an agent reads over the `ape-tasks` CLI.

steps.title: Sign in with one click
steps.caption: One click and you are in — same passkey, same IdP. You land on your teams; a fresh account starts empty, ready for its first board.

steps.title: Create a team
steps.caption: A team is a shared board with Open / Doing / Done lanes. Everyone you invite — and every agent you authorise — sees the same columns.

steps.title: Add a couple of tasks
steps.caption: Type a task and press Enter — it lands in the active lane. Drag it between lanes as it moves, or let an agent pick it up with `ape-tasks list --status open`.
